project_parts.display_name: JAX_Detection (custom JAX/Flax training pipeline, approximate fit to 'data' type)

completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith, 1 part (jax_detection), approximate project_type_id=data, confirmed by user
Found 12 existing docs in docs/. User provided refactor context (see findings.user_context).
Tech stack: JAX/Flax/Optax on Python, tf.data for input pipeline. Strategy+Factory+DI pattern confirmed.

Dead code audit: 15/22 model_library.py architectures unreferenced; 6 inference functions duplicated & divergent across 3-5 files; train_detection.py confirmed vestige by user. Written to dead-code-and-duplication-audit.md
Annotated source tree written to source-tree-analysis.md
Dev/deployment guide written (no CI/CD, no packaging, no tests found) to development-guide.md
architecture.md written, synthesizes gap vs strat_global.md
Validation: no (To be generated) markers found, all planned docs present

findings.project_classification: Monolith Python/JAX project, no client/server split, no standard packaging (no requirements.txt/pyproject.toml). Core files: dataset_configs.py, data_management.py, model_library.py, trainer.py, task_strategies.py, main.py, reporting.py, checkpoint_manager.py.
findings.user_context: Projet brownfield JAX de détection/classification d'images d'avion. Code générique piloté par dataset_configs.py pour supporter plusieurs typologies de projets (configs actives: FIGHTERJET_CLASSIFICATION, FIGHTERJET_DETECTION ; config JAX_KEPLER = exemple non lié à l'aéronautique). Objectif refactor: éliminer le code mort, retirer les copies en dur de méthodes, conserver un socle de code commun/mutualisé, la modularité et la performance. Démarche voulue: rétro-documentation BMAD d'abord, proposition de refactor à valider, implémentation ensuite.
findings.dead_code_summary: 15/22 model_library.py architectures unreferenced by any config. 6 inference functions (load_jax_model, load_detection_model, predict_crop, get_iou, non_max_suppression, _preprocess_crop_to_hwc) duplicated & divergent across 3-5 files (root + tools/). train_detection.py confirmed legacy vestige (pre-merge era JAX_Detection/JAX_Classification), user approved archiving.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. Next: brownfield PRD workflow, pointed at docs/index.md.
